productDisplayName: Numero Uno Men Casual White Shoes
description: Structured sneakers from numero uno for the cosmopolitan male. Minimal outer with powerful stitch detailing, styling the shoe into a sleek silhouette of sport perfection. These disctinctive shoes add an authentic sportswear accent to your ensemble. Wear this with a sweatshirt, jeans and a tee or a shirt. This NU pair cuts a dash to downtime dressing, while lending your outfit a relaxed vibe. Upper Synthetic leather upper Reinforced overlays on the midfoot and heel collar for support Central lacing systemwith a padded tongue Fabric lining Pull loop at the collar Midsole EVA midsole Outsole TPU outsole with exaggerated herringbone grooves and a suction point Shoe care Wipe surface with soft, clean, cloth or brush, cold water and mild detergent to remove dust Do not machine wash or use a drier Avoid storing shoes in extremely hot conditions or in direct sunlight
